question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated by publishers in California, considering the royalty percentages and quantities sold

plan.question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated by publishers in California, considering the royalty percentages and quantities sold
plan.detail_query:
SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titles.title_id, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, roysched.royalty, (sales.qty * titles.price * roysched.royalty / 100) AS revenue
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
WHERE publishers.state = 'CA' AND sales.qty BETWEEN roysched.lorange AND roysched.hirange

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titles.title_id, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, roysched.royalty
blocks.notes: This block retrieves the publisher ID, publisher name, title ID, title, quantity sold, price, and royalty percentage for titles published in California and sold within the specified royalty ranges.

blocks.name: root
blocks.select_clause: SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS total_revenue
blocks.notes: This block calculates the total revenue generated by publishers in California by summing the product of quantity sold, price, and royalty percentage for each title.

build_logs.notes: This block retrieves the publisher ID, publisher name, title ID, title, quantity sold, price, and royalty percentage for titles published in California and sold within the specified royalty ranges.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
LIMIT 5

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the total revenue generated by publishers in California by summing the product of quantity sold, price, and royalty percentage for each title.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titles.title_id, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, roysched.royalty
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
WHERE (publishers.state = 'CA') AND (sales.qty BETWEEN roysched.lorange AND roysched.hirange)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

preview.title: Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets

steps.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titles.title_id, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, roysched.royalty
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
WHERE (publishers.state = 'CA') AND (sales.qty BETWEEN roysched.lorange AND roysched.hirange)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT city
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.city, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) AS total_sales
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (publishers.state = 'CA')
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.city) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.revenue_per_author) AS avg_revenue_per_author
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title, COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS author_count, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) AS total_revenue, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) / COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS revenue_per_author
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (sales.qty > 0)
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title
HAVING (COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue calculated by summing the product of quantity, price, and royalty percentage (divided by 100) for all sales of titles from California publishers, where the quantity sold falls within the applicable royalty range?
